# API Wrapper MVP starter (FastAPI)
# pip install fastapi uvicorn httpx

from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel
import httpx

app = FastAPI(title="A Software IntegrationAI", description="A software integration platform that allows researchers and engineers to integrate and manage multiple scientific comput")

class Request(BaseModel):
    input: str

@app.post("/run")
async def run(req: Request):
    """Core endpoint — replace with actual upstream API call."""
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        # TODO: replace with real upstream API
        resp = await client.post("https://api.example.com/v1/run", json={{"input": req.input}})
        if resp.status_code != 200:
            raise HTTPException(status_code=resp.status_code, detail=resp.text)
        return resp.json()

# Run: uvicorn main:app --reload

A Comprehensive SalesAI

idea.problem: Challenges in onboarding, training, and retaining Sales Development Representatives in a remote setup
idea.target_user: Sales Development Lead at a scaling e-commerce business with a high SDR turnover rate
idea.solution: A comprehensive Sales Development Representative (SDR) onboarding, training, and management platform, providing structured learning paths, real-time feedback, and data-driven insights for efficient remote talent management
idea.why_now: As companies expand their remote teams, they struggle to ensure seamless onboarding, training, and retention of SDRs, compromising their sales performance and customer satisfaction
idea.existing_spend_behavior: Companies often invest in employee training and development platforms, but these initiatives often fail to cater to the unique needs of SDRs and are disconnected from sales outcomes

idea.problem: Companies struggle to find, vet, and onboard top Sales Development Representatives in a timely and cost-effective manner.
idea.target_user: Manager of Sales or Hiring at growing SaaS, MarTech, FinTech, or EdTech companies
idea.solution: Our SaaS platform offers a curated marketplace connecting hiring managers with top Sales Development Representative candidates, reducing the time and cost of the hiring process.
idea.why_now: With the shift to remote work, the remote talent market needs more innovative solutions to bridge gaps between exceptional talent and hiring companies.
idea.existing_spend_behavior: Companies already spend 10% of their sales budget on recruitment agencies and hiring teams to fill similar roles.
